title: Thestra Village
intro: A remote village huddled beneath an endless storm. The blight seeps from the Sunken Temple, and hope wears thin.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: The blight grows stronger each day. The Temple below is the source.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: I need a brave soul to investigate. Will you help us?

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Enter the temple and find the source. Be swift, the blight spares none.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Take your time, but not too long. The village depends on you.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Our healer Mina went into the temple days ago. No one has seen her.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: She may still be alive. Please look for her.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Thank you. She was last seen near the Hall of Echoes.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Every hour counts, but I understand. The temple is treacherous.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Mina is safe, but the blight remains. Ancient texts mention three tokens.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: Speak with Mina – she knows the ritual. Retrieve the tokens from the temple depths.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: The tokens are spread across the lower floors. Hurry, the blight spreads.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: The purification stone is in your hands. Descend to the sanctum and end this curse.

commands.speaker: Elder Aris
commands.text: The storm is lifting! You have saved Thestra. The temple is sealed forever.

elseCommands.speaker: Elder Aris
elseCommands.text: Your deeds are already legend. Rest while you can.

elseCommands.speaker: Elder Aris
elseCommands.text: The blight spreads while we wait. We need someone to enter the temple and find our healer.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: Elder Aris mentioned the tokens, yes? We need three of them.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: The Token of Earth, Token of Fire, and Token of Shadow. Together they can cleanse the blight.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: Each lies in a different depth of the temple. Powerful guardians watch over them.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: Come back when you are. I will be here preparing the ritual.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: The curse is broken! The village is saved. I am forever grateful.

elseCommands.speaker: Healer Mina
elseCommands.text: Use the purification stone in the sanctum. Destroy the Cursebeast!

elseCommands.speaker: Healer Mina
elseCommands.text: You have all three tokens! I can now perform the ritual to create the Purification Stone.

elseCommands.speaker: Healer Mina
elseCommands.text: The stone is ready. Take it to the deepest sanctum and shatter the source.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: Any luck with the tokens? Earth, Fire, Shadow – they are on the lower floors.

elseCommands.speaker: Healer Mina
elseCommands.text: I owe you my life. If you need healing, I am happy to help.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: All restored. Stay safe out there.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: The village is grateful for everything you have done.

elseCommands.speaker: Healer Mina
elseCommands.text: I am glad you are safe. The temple holds many dangers.

commands.speaker: Healer Mina
commands.text: All restored. Stay safe out there.

script.speaker: Shopkeeper Garrick
script.text: Welcome to Garrick's Goods! Need supplies, equipment, or a bit of news?

commands.speaker: Shopkeeper Garrick
commands.text: Come back anytime. Stay safe out there.

script.speaker: Townswoman Elara
script.text: The storm never used to be this fierce. It all started when the temple began bleeding darkness.

commands.speaker: Townswoman Elara
commands.text: Old Man Harker by the gate says the temple's first floor is full of whispering echoes. Do not let them lead you astray.

commands.speaker: Townswoman Elara
commands.text: If you are looking for Mina, she was last seen near a side chamber on the first floor. Poor woman went in alone.

elseCommands.speaker: Townswoman Elara
elseCommands.text: Stock up at Garrick's before heading into the temple. His prices are fair, and the depths are unforgiving.

script.text: Your cottage stands quiet. The hearth is cold, but it is safe.

commands.text: The warmth restores you. You feel ready to face the blight.
There is work to be done.

script.text: The weathered shrine stands unbowed. Faded offerings lie at the altar.

commands.text: A warm light radiates from the shrine. The spirits of Thestra honor your deeds.

elseCommands.text: You offer a silent prayer. The shrine feels watchful, waiting.

script.speaker: Young Darius
script.text: Hey! You are the summoner everyone is talking about, right?

commands.speaker: Young Darius
commands.text: You are a legend! I want to be a summoner just like you!

commands.speaker: Young Darius
commands.text: The temple is scary, but I bet you can handle it! My dad says only brave folks go down there.

elseCommands.speaker: Young Darius
elseCommands.text: If you are heading into the temple, be careful! The blight makes monsters go crazy.

title: Sunken Temple Floor 1: Hall of Echoes
intro: Cracked stone corridors echo with whispers. The path to Mina is nearby.

script.text: Mina gives you a herbal note hinting at the tokens.

title: Sunken Temple Floor 3: Chamber of Sacrifice
intro: A vast chamber lit by braziers. The Guardian Golem stands before the Token of Fire.

script.text: You claim the Token of Fire from the defeated golem.

title: Sunken Temple Floor 4: Sanctum of the Fallen
intro: The deepest level. Black crystal veins pulse with dark energy. The Cursebeast lurks.

script.text: The altar glows with shadow. You take the Token of Shadow.
The Cursebeast rises from the shadows!
You shatter the source with the Purification Stone. The blight recedes.
